titleStmt.title: SII 29.1: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 1. (A.R. No. B. 551 of 1961-62.) BHŌGĀVATI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab crected horizontally near the temple of the Hanumān.

It states that when Akāḷavarsha was ruling over the empire, his subordinate Jagattuṅgadēva administered Eḍadoṟe-2000 as aṇugajīvitā. The record being damaged seems to register a land grant by certain gāvuṇḍas probably to Vāchaspatibhaṭṭa, the sthānapati of Pallavēśvara.
In the date portion only the cyclic year Virōdhikrit is mentioned. If it is equated with Śaka 693 then the date 771-772 A.D. suits with the reign period of king Akāḷavarsha Kṛishṇa I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastyakāḷavarṣadēva śrīpṛthvī va
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara pa
rama bhaṭṭāraka pravarddamāna vijayarājya sukha
saṁkhā(ka)thā vinōdadindācandrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ prithuvī rājyaṁ
sale tatpāda padmōpajīvi śrī jagattuṁgadevareḍadoṟe
yircchāsiramaṇuga jīvitamāgi duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭa pratipāḷa
nakriyeyinduttarōttarābhivṛddhiyindāḷutta(tti)re yirccāsirakaṁ vēdapāḷayyaṁ pa(pe)The letter Lu is written below the line.
ḍa yāge virōdhikritsaṁvatsaraṁ pravartisi svastya lātapāṇi mukha
yama niyama pratipāḷana bhasmōddhūḷita paṁ
śrīta kapāḷa kta śiva dhyānapargge jīvita mahāvrata śarīrārgni
ka jalē pallavēśvara sthānādhipatigaḷappa śrī vācaspatibhaṭṭāraru
vāla sapanava paḍedu
śiḍi de samaya rāgi cakravartiyaṁ meccisi bandu
ya ra maneyoḷa ḻdu yacōṟara gāvuṇḍa gāvuṇḍayyaṁ ṟe
llamagāvuṇḍha meccikoṭṭa sthātime
ṇṭu vaṟeya lā kkal nālku mattaru
pālukkisidiṁ baṟeya ya mā
ya yoḷmūva
brāhmaṇaru maka vileyuvanaḻida dōṣa .
Digital edition of SII 29.1 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
